---
title: "Courses"
description: "I teach economics and public policy at Takshashila's programmes"
---

I teach courses at the [Takshashila Institution](https://takshashila.org.in) on economics and public policy.

## Guest Lectures

I'm available for guest lectures on:

- Economic Policy
- Trade Policy
- Platform Economics
- Bioeconomy
- Indian Public Policy

[Contact me](mailto:anupam@takshashila.org.in) for speaking engagements.
